---
name: Bug Report 🐞
about: Did you find one of our "features"? Report it here!
title: '[BUG] '
labels: 'bug, needs-triage'
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is. Did your browser crash? Did a layout break? -->


## 🔬 Steps to Reproduce
<!-- How can we reproduce this? -->
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## 🎯 Expected Behavior
<!-- What SHOULD have happened if we were competent developers? -->


## 📸 Screenshots / Console Logs
<!-- If applicable, add screenshots, network payloads, or copy/paste the DevTools console output here to help explain your problem. -->


## 🖥 Environment
 - OS: [e.g. Windows, Mac, Linux]
 - Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Safari] (Wait, we told you not to use Safari in the README...)
 - Version: [e.g. 22]

## 💡 Potential Fix
<!-- Do you know how to fix this? Give us a hint! -->
